title: Agent Delegation Grant
description: Implement agent_delegation grant type. Agent presents delegation_token (proving parent agent authorized it) plus its own credential. Service validates the delegation chain, computes effective scopes (intersection of all links in chain), and issues an access token with those scopes. Include delegation_chain claim in issued JWT.
validation: agent_delegation grant type implemented on POST /api/v1/auth/token
Computes effective scopes as intersection of chain
Issues access token with computed scopes
Tests verify invalid delegation chains are rejected
